text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While training with Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There you are, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Air Groove. Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, the student council is conducting an
orientation for our newest students...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And they wouldn't stop asking if they could meet
you just once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Behind Air Groove, a number of younger students
are staring at Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Young Student A
text_block_list.text: Omigosh! It's really Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text:
She's that "runaway superstar," right? She's so
coooool!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh? Th-they all know me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course they do. You've garnered quite a few
followers among the younger students as of late.

text_block_list.name: Young Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Suzuka! Um, would it be all right if we ran
together?

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text:
Hey! No fair! I want Suzuka to teach me her
running style too!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now, hold on a second. Can't you see Suzuka's in
the middle of her training?
choice_data_list: I'm sure she can spare some time.
I'm sure she can spare some time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Silence Suzuka how instructing the
younger students can also benefit her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All right... I'm not sure I'm quite up to the task
though...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But... Uh, Trainer? How should I even begin?
choice_data_list: How about you run alongside them?

Why don't you teach them about your running
style?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Run with them... Okay! Running is my specialty.

text_block_list.name: Young Student A
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yippeee! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Suzuka. I'll say this as a precaution. Don't go
overboard.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I really mean it. Do you understand me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We'll be all right. We're only running after all.
There's nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You "only running" is precisely what I'm worried
about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...At any rate, I'll leave them in your hands for
now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone. Ready... go!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pheeew!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes? Do you want to run too?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh.. No. I want to know why you're running laps all by yourself when you should be running with the students I left you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Didn't I explicitly tell you not to go overboard?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Young Student A
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! I'm super happy I got to see Suzuka run
up close!

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text:
That's right! We wanna do our best to keep up! So
please, keep going!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What should I do, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, if they say it's all right, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch over Silence Suzuka as she instructs the
eager young students.

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text: Wow! Can you believe it? Suzuka's teaching us?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I don't know if I'd call it a lesson per se...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just take it step by step, Suzuka. For example,
what goes through your mind right before the
start of a race?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ummm... I just think about enjoying running.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...All right. And after that?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Then I run. And then I run more. And I
keep running until I reach the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see... In hindsight, I shouldn't have bothered
asking you to explain.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-why?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Listen up! Once she's taken the lead, she uses her
position to control the pace, and—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wow... That sounds so complicated.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This is your strategy!

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! We'll put what we've learned
to use the next chance we get!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That was so easy to understand. You're amazing,
Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please. You've certainly heard as much in your
racing tactics class.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And regardless of whether you adopt it or not, it
wouldn't hurt to commit the theorem to memory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Because you never know when you'll be in a
position in which you must teach someone else.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're right... So, um, Air Groove. Would you be
all right with teaching me again sometime?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you ready for that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, then. Seeing as your grades could use the help, I suppose we'll have to organize an intensive study session soon.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, it seems as though Silence
Suzuka's grades have gone up thanks to Air
Groove's instruction.
